title: S + be + accustomed/committed/dedicated + to + V-ing

formulas.zh: 主詞 + 動詞 be + 形容詞 + to + 動名詞（to 為介系詞）
主詞 + 動詞 be + 形容詞 + to + 名詞（to 為介系詞）

explanation: 此句型用來表達主詞對某事物或某行為的態度、習慣或傾向。形容詞與 to 之間為固定搭配，to 為介系詞而非不定詞符號。常見形容詞包括：accustomed、used、committed、devoted、opposed、resistant、similar、equal 等。需特別注意 to 後接動名詞（V-ing）或名詞，切勿誤用不定詞。此句型常用於描述已養成的習慣、堅定的立場或內在特質。

examples.eng: She is accustomed to getting up early in the morning.
examples.chi: 她習慣於每天早上早起。

examples.eng: The company is committed to reducing carbon emissions by 2030.
examples.chi: 該公司承諾於 2030 年前減少碳排放。

examples.eng: Many people are opposed to changing the current education system.
examples.chi: 許多人反對改變現行教育制度。

examples.eng: He is devoted to helping disadvantaged children through his charity work.
examples.chi: 他透過慈善工作致力於幫助弱勢兒童。

extension.tip: 判斷 to 是介系詞還是不定詞符號的關鍵：若 to 後可直接跟名詞、動名詞、代名詞，則為介系詞；若後接動詞原形，則為不定詞符號。此句型中 to 恆為介系詞，故必須接動名詞（V-ing）或名詞。常見錯誤為寫成 be used to do 的不定詞用法。

examples.test: She is used to getting up early. ✓ vs. She is used to get up early. ✗
examples.result: → to 為介系詞，必須接動名詞 getting，不可接不定詞 get

examples.test: He is committed to working on this project. ✓ vs. He is committed to work on this project. ✗
examples.result: → 介系詞用法需搭配動名詞 working，不可用不定詞形式

examples.test: They are opposed to violence. ✓ vs. They are opposed to violencing. ✗
examples.result: → to 後可接名詞 violence，不一定要動名詞；但接動詞概念則用動名詞

extension.note: 記住這些形容詞都帶 to 介系詞：accustomed/used/opposed/committed/devoted/dedicated/similar/equal/resistant，to 後必接動名詞（V-ing）或名詞，絕不接不定詞。

parts: a daily walk in the park.
exercises.sentence: The elderly man is accustomed to taking a daily walk in the park.
exercises.translation: 這位老人習慣於每天在公園裡散步。

exercises.sentence: Our organization is committed to promoting renewable energy sources.
exercises.translation: 我們的組織致力於推廣可再生能源。

exercises.sentence: Many citizens are opposed to using excessive plastic bags in supermarkets.
exercises.translation: 許多市民反對在超市使用過多的塑膠袋。

parts: new technology often perform better in online learning.
exercises.sentence: Students who are not resistant to adapting to new technology often perform better in online learning.
exercises.translation: 不抗拒適應新科技的學生通常在線上學習中表現更好。

vocab_table_label: 常用 to + V-ing 片語

mc_exercises.question_chi: 選擇正確的句型完成句子，表達習慣
mc_exercises.question_eng: After living abroad for five years, she is accustomed _______ in English every day.
mc_exercises.explanation: 正確答案是B。形容詞 accustomed 後接介系詞 to，to 為介系詞而非不定詞符號，必須接動名詞 V-ing。A 項誤用不定詞；C 項缺少介系詞 to；D 項進行式不適合表達習慣性動作。

mc_exercises.question_chi: 補充適當的詞彙和句型，表達公司的承諾
mc_exercises.question_eng: The organization is committed _______ sustainable practices in all its operations.
mc_exercises.explanation: 正確答案是B。committed 後接介系詞 to，其後需接動名詞 adopting。A 項誤用不定詞形式；C 項介系詞 with 不符此句型搭配；D 項介系詞 for 用法錯誤，committed 不搭 to+for。

mc_exercises.question_chi: 根據句型補充空格，表達反對態度
mc_exercises.question_eng: Despite the majority's support, several council members remained opposed _______ the new zoning proposal.
mc_exercises.explanation: 正確答案是A。opposed 為形容詞，後接介系詞 to，其後應接動名詞 accepting。B 項誤用不定詞；C 項 against 非標準搭配；D 項進行式被動形式不符習慣用法，且不適合表達持續的反對立場。

mc_exercises.question_chi: 選擇正確的句型表達長期習慣和態度
mc_exercises.question_eng: Having worked in this field for decades, the veteran researcher is devoted _______ new methodologies even though they challenge traditional approaches he once championed.
mc_exercises.explanation: 正確答案是A。devoted 為形容詞，後接介系詞 to（固定搭配），to 為介系詞需接動名詞 exploring，表達持久的態度與習慣。B 項誤用不定詞；C 項缺少介系詞 to；D 項完成式不符句意，且不正確的句型組合。

translation_exercises.sentence_chi: 我已經習慣早上六點起床。
translation_exercises.answer: I am accustomed to getting up at 6 a.m.
hints: 句型框架：S + be + accustomed + to + V-ing
常見錯誤：to 後接動名詞而非不定詞（× to get up）

translation_exercises.sentence_chi: 我們的班級致力於參與環保活動。
translation_exercises.answer: Our class is committed to participating in environmental protection activities.
hints: 句型框架：S + be + committed + to + V-ing；to 為介系詞非不定詞
注意：participate in 搭配介系詞 in，參與應使用動名詞 participating

translation_exercises.sentence_chi: 運動員們習慣於每天訓練至少三小時以維持最佳體能狀態。
translation_exercises.answer: The athletes are accustomed to training at least three hours daily to maintain optimal physical condition.
key_points: 複雜修飾成分（時間副詞、目的不定詞）
hints: 句型框架：S + be + accustomed + to + V-ing；整句中 V-ing 後可接其他修飾成分
易混淆：句末的 to maintain 是目的不定詞而非介系詞 to，與前面介系詞 to 區分

translation_exercises.sentence_chi: 儘管許多人反對這項政策，環保倡議者們仍然專注於推動永續發展和改變公眾認知。
translation_exercises.answer: Although many people are opposed to the policy, environmental advocates remain dedicated to promoting sustainable development and changing public awareness.
key_points: be opposed to / be dedicated to
多個 V-ing 並列（promoting...and changing...）
複雜句結構搭配讓步子句
hints: 句型框架：S + be + opposed/dedicated + to + V-ing；多個動名詞可用 and 連接
進階用法：V-ing 後可直接接受詞或修飾語，無須重複 to（× to promoting...and to changing）
